headline: Is Allegion (ALLE) Now Fairly Priced After Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: If you are wondering whether Allegion's current share price reflects its underlying value, this breakdown will help you frame what you are really paying for. The stock closed at US$142.49, with a 2.0% decline over the last 7 days, a 12.1% decline over the last 30 days, an 11.4% decline year to date and a 13.7% decline over the last year, which can shift how you think about both opportunity and risk. Over a longer stretch, Allegion has returned 48.0% over 3 years and 20.8% over 5 years. This...
